Announcements

Erasmus+ Exchange Program Study Mobility Written and Speaking Language Exam Announcement

As part of the additional application period for the 2024-1-TR01-KA131-HED-000198317project, written and speaking exams will be held on November 5, 2025 Wednesday, and November 7, 2025 Friday, to select students who will participate in the Erasmus+ Exchange Program for the 2025-2026 Spring Semester for studies abroad.

The Erasmus+ language exam consists of two parts: the written exam (75%) which aims to assess the student's grammar, reading comprehension, and vocabulary skills, and the speaking exam (25%) which evaluates the speaking ability. Candidates who do not participate in the written exam will not be eligible to take the speaking exam. There are no make-up exams for the language assessment.

Students who fail to achieve a minimum score of 55 (fifty-five) in the written exam will not be eligible to participate in the speaking exam. Students who do not receive a "passing grade" in the foreign language exam will not be considered for evaluation.

In order for students to be successful in the exam and to be eligible for mobility, they must obtain a minimum score of B2 level according to the CEFR system in the English exam (both speaking and written). The weighted success lower limit for the exam is 65 (sixty-five) points.

Written Exam Information:

Date:

Location:

C Block, 6th Floor, Room F

Time:

2.00 PM

Speaking Exam Information:

Date:

Location:

C Block, 6th Floor Room E

Time:

1:30 PM

For the exam rules, please click here.

Important Note:

The students who qualify to take the speaking exam on November 7, 2025,  will receive a notification to their email addresses with the @galata.edu.trextension on November 6, 2025.
